item.title: Just bebe
item.description: Not my bebe. My cat would go Freddy Kruger on me if I attempted this. Some piano background music (sounds like Ludovico Einaudi) and happy senior kitty purrs at the end. Edit: The music is Andrea Vanzo's "Valzer d'Inverno". https://youtu.be/D5uc2mJi3Mg?feature=shared Thanks to @myotherusernameisalreadytaken !

item.dc:creator: bleuamericans

item.title: I don't have anything nice to say, actually
item.description: I think sometimes we try to paint people into a box; good people are all good and bad people are all bad. But people who are good and loving and kind to their families sometimes treat people outside of their families like shit. Sometimes, good people - who are otherwise kind and generous - support policies that leave people unhoused, enslaved, disenfranchised, and dying. I don't believe in Jesus, but I used to, and it especially annoys me when these complicated people do. If someone claims Jesus in their beliefs, but I can't see him in their actions, I secretly hope they get to hear it from the horses mouth when they die. I hope they meet the Jesus who told them their wealth would bar them from heaven. I hope they have to answer to a god who told them to sacrifice everything to protect their neighbors and foreigners, as well as their loved ones. I know it is a toxic impulse to wish that fate on others. I just don't know how else to express my disappointment. It feels like saying, "l wish Santa Claus WAS real, so he could leave you coal." Is just a weird impulse I have. In general, I don't believe in an afterlife; if there is one, I hope it is as precious as this life, or that it is a comfort after the difficulties of this life. Or both, really.
item.dc:creator: youngfarty

item.title: Love it when a plan comes together - kitty
item.dc:creator: DOcelot

item.title: 76yrs old, dude tried to help folks
item.description: He watched the fattening of the US, he didn't know everything but he tried to help people fight it. He encouraged unhealthy people that they could change things and worked to give them the tools necessary. All with a smile. Never judged, never insulted. He wasn't about vanity or pride. I'm not saying he was Mr. Rodgers but he's on the list.
item.dc:creator: TalkingSnake

item.title: Winner of hearts
item.description: Do your best today as well!
item.dc:creator: TheOneWhoWasLeft

item.title: The only ever picture taken of a Concorde at mach 2 speed
item.description: April, 1985, 50,000 feet (15240 meters) over the Irish sea. The photo itself was taken by Adrian Meredith, a prestigious British photographer, from a Panavia Tornado, a British fighter of the Royal Air Force. Meredith had to be quick and precise, because flying that high he had less than 4 mins to take the shot. The fighter couldn't keep up with the Concorde beyond that time. If you look at the horizon, the Earth's curvature begins to show. What a beauty!
item.dc:creator: SocialKeked

item.title: I bet this guy gets good tips
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: A palate cleanser from... everything
item.description:
Just have a couple things, pet tax at the end, quick in n out dump morty
Anyway here's unrelated Belgian techno anthem Pump Up The Jam but with a dog
The two in question that I'm pet sitting. Oh it's so much easier with just the cat. I got a rule, drunks kids and dogs, I'll need a paycheck. Cats I'll do for a fridge raid. We had a big storm after I got off work late and doggo needs one walk a day so I decided better late than never. Mud patch. Cartoon banana peel sound effects. Luckily I ascribe to the go bag philosophy. I had just enough bandaids left for the scrapes. And Mr. Magoo'd it past most of it that would've ruined my clothes. Change of shirt, and 3 bandaids later... I'm ready for my late night/ early morning dinner
item.dc:creator: GravyEducation

greetings online friends. lookin pretty high to me
must be nice
lovely
unfortunately correct, i do not
1
sounds pretty nice
he will always be Pennywise to me
will never settle for non-authentic cat excrement candy again
not a fan of this
yes
we've all been there
a lobster lover's dream
yeah i need to see this
mmm hmm
it's just gif
lemme get a honk on that bobo
dang
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: My wife IRL
item.description: True story, when my wife was pregnant she ordered over 100 dollars worth of Chinese food (this was in 2010). I thought she ordered individual entrees, but it wasn't! They were all DINNER ORDERS. When they delivered, the person delivering asked if we were having a party or something and I said, "No, why?" Guy just laughed and said here ya go. I thought we would have enough for a few days, but I underestimated the ability of a pregnant woman. We had no leftovers, she devoured it all.
item.dc:creator: zMike70z

item.dc:creator: ChargutayCaustail

item.title: The Universe giveth, the Universe taketh
item.description: Went to a motorcyle event yesterday. Specifically for the raffle. Both me and BF have never won shit in our lives and we were joking how ironic it would be, since last year we got a 2nd bike so we wouldn't have to share just my old one. After a very awkward acceptance, I think I was drunk with joy and surprise. When we left the event, I miscalculated a gravel patch. I wasn't even driving fast yet. Bike slid, my ankle underneath. I've never had a broken bone, but I was able to still walk on said foot, albeit in pain. Decided to visit the emergency room to check. To everyone's surprise, doc included, broken fibula. 1 month on my arse. Bike won is the new KTM 790 Adventure. So many mixed emotions, especially since I've had some extremely shit few years. Edit to clarify: the bike I slipped with is my old one, of 8 years. And it's fine
item.dc:creator: SaintLuciferVonAllah

item.title: USA had Mr Rogers, Germany had Peter Lustig
item.description: My favorite children TV show named Löwenzahn / "Dandelion". Peter Lustig ( his real name) was the host and he explained us kids everything. Every episode had a theme and he talked about that and explained it. At the end of every episode he would say something like, " and now, turn off the TV, its enough, go out and play, do something else". An important part of my childhood during the 80s. It's still running today with a different host.
item.dc:creator: MaterialGirl1

item.title: Love heals
item.description: Abused and abandoned, every gentle touch assured him that, even in his darkest moments, he was going to be OK. Love heals, it truly does.

item.dc:creator: dbrylka

item.title: Some of my porthole oil paintings
item.description:
I have been working on a 12 piece series of porthole paintings, and here are a few of the most recent ones. They are all oil paintings on custom cut wood panels, and mounted in their own portholes. They range from 6.5” to 11.5” in diameter. I’ve loved creating them, and I hope you enjoy!
Varnishing this one!
item.dc:creator: PilotBuilder

item.title: Trump Shooter a Registered Republican, Secretary of Retribution, Dictatorship, Republican Calls for Civil War, Republican Violence and Domestic Terrorism
item.description:
https://www.thedailybeast.com/rep-jamie-raskin-sounds-the-alarm-on-trumps-self-declared-secretary-of-retribution Republicans are over eager to commit violence as we have just learned that the Trump shooter is a registered Republican. This comes at the heels as Trump highlights a Secretary of Retribution to round up political opponents.
https://apnews.com/article/trump-hannity-dictator-authoritarian-presidential-election-f27e7e9d7c13fabbe3ae7dd7f1235c72 https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/2023/11/30/trump-dictator-2024-election-robert-kagan/ Trump has promised to become dictator on day one and to target his political opponents with violence.
https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3gw58wv4e9o The Trump shooter was a registered Republican like that of Kyle Rittenhouse, hero on the nazi right who got away with mass murder at a BLM protest.
https://www.rawstory.com/donald-trump-civil-war-2668743313/ Following the Trump shooter event, Republicans quickly called for civil war. They are making lists of their enemies and are eager to kill their neighbors for their dear leader.
https://www.foxnews.com/media/cbs-anchor-chides-trump-statement-after-assassination-attempt-no-call-lowering-temperature Even though this is a FOX article, the CBS speaker is correct. Trump failed to lower the temperature at this event and in effect called for violence against their political opponents. https://www.salon.com/2024/07/14/donald-survives-an-assassination-attempt-can-america-survive-what-happens-next/ America and Democracy are in extreme danger of MAGA and Trumps fascism. We need to treat MAGAts as the domestic terrorists they are, left alone they will harm everyone around them. https://democrats-homeland.house.gov/news/in-the-news/domestic-terrorism-is-a-threat-we-cant-ignore MAGA is the largest domestic terror threat in America. We almost lost our Democracy on J6th. We must nullify the Trump and MAGA threat once and for all.
item.dc:creator: XavieColorQueen
